chapter_title.en: Displeasure with evil and pleasure with good define a believer

text: وَ بِهَذَا اَلْإِسْنَادِ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ ص مَنْ سَاءَتْهُ سَيِّئَةٌ وَ سَرَّتْهُ حَسَنَةٌ فَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ.

en.badr-shahin: (The same previous series of relaters)… The Prophet (s) said: He who is displeased by his evil deeds and pleased by his good deeds, then he is a believer.
